name: Predictive Fresh Waste Prevention
description: AI-driven cold chain monitoring, risk scoring, and autonomous markdown execution to prevent fresh product waste before it occurs.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph orchestrates the deterministic pipeline: IoT ingestion → risk scoring → SLM classification → conditional routing → human gate → action execution → feedback loop.
unscriptedDescription: Claude generates decision briefs, runs what-if scenario simulations, and supports interactive deliberation with the Category Manager before approval.

name: AI Demand Sensing
description: Real-time demand signal fusion combining POS, weather, events, and competitor pricing to improve forecast accuracy by up to 35%.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph manages the signal fusion pipeline: data ingestion → feature engineering → ensemble scoring → anomaly detection → forecast adjustment.
unscriptedDescription: Claude analyses forecast deviations, generates narrative explanations for demand shifts, and proposes corrective actions for review.

name: Dynamic DC Routing
description: Optimise distribution centre routing in real-time based on demand signals, capacity constraints, and transport availability.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph orchestrates the full routing optimisation: demand aggregation → capacity check → route scoring → constraint validation → dispatch.
unscriptedDescription: Claude reviews edge cases where routing constraints conflict, generating alternative solutions and trade-off analyses.

name: Promotion ROI Optimiser
description: Predict promotion uplift and cannibalisation effects using historical pattern analysis and competitive intelligence.
scriptedDescription: Lightweight LangGraph pipeline for data collection and feature extraction from promotional calendars.
unscriptedDescription: Claude drives the core analysis: interpreting promotion patterns, simulating uplift scenarios, and recommending optimal promotion strategies through interactive dialogue.

name: Supplier Risk Monitor
description: Continuous monitoring of supplier quality metrics, delivery performance, and risk indicators with automated escalation.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph manages the monitoring pipeline: metric ingestion → anomaly detection → risk classification → conditional escalation → alert dispatch.
unscriptedDescription: Claude generates supplier risk narratives and recommends remediation strategies when anomalies are detected.

name: Autonomous Replenishment
description: Self-adjusting store replenishment engine that learns from local demand patterns and automatically adapts order quantities.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph orchestrates end-to-end: demand prediction → inventory check → order calculation → constraint validation → auto-submit → confirmation.
unscriptedDescription: Claude handles exception analysis when orders deviate significantly from patterns, providing explanations and adjustment recommendations.

name: Store Energy Optimisation
description: AI-controlled refrigeration and HVAC scheduling based on footfall prediction, external temperature, and energy pricing.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph controls the scheduling loop: weather forecast → footfall prediction → energy pricing → schedule optimisation → equipment dispatch.
unscriptedDescription: Claude simulates energy scenarios under different weather and pricing conditions, helping facilities managers choose optimal configurations.

name: Dynamic Markdown Intelligence
description: Optimal markdown timing and depth using demand elasticity models, competitor pricing, and remaining shelf life estimation.
scriptedDescription: LangGraph manages the pricing pipeline: shelf life estimation → elasticity scoring → competitor scan → price calculation → approval gate → POS update.
unscriptedDescription: Claude generates markdown strategy recommendations, simulates customer response scenarios, and enables collaborative pricing decisions.
